case_summary: Pool gone bright green after a week of no circulation during load shedding; visible algae bloom.

ground_truth.notes: Quintessential SA load-shedding green-pool case. Tests routing to pool_chemical_balance (water chemistry, algae treatment) and that the system reads the obvious algae cue rather than over-engineering toward pool_pump_filter.

inputs.user_text: Our pool has gone completely green over the last week or so — the pump tripped during stage 6 load shedding and we only noticed this morning. You can't see more than a few cm into the water. The pump itself seems to work now that we've reset the breaker, but the water is still green and the floor of the pool is slippery.
